title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game**
*2026*
Develop your character, fulfill quests, and shape history in 15th-century Bohemia.
![Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_1f0adc0f.png)

2. **Defenders of Hogwarts**
*2026*
Will you defend Hogwarts? Or choose to join the Dark Forces?
![Defenders of Hogwarts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_322250d2.jpg)

3. **Wingspan Pocket**
*2026*
Swiftly build and activate a row of colorful birds.
![Wingspan Pocket](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_2e8429a7.jpg)

4. **Container**
*2026*
Set prices as you produce, sell, and ship containers in a tight economic simulation.
![Container](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_7d7d41ab.jpg)

5. **Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game**
*None*
The land of milk and honey is filling up with blood - make sure it's not yours.
![Kingdom Come: Deliverance – The Board Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_2a98900c.jpg)

6. **Quickdraw: Battle for Silver City**
*2026*
The Law is caught in a tense shootout with Bandits in this asymmetric squad builder.
![Quickdraw: Battle for Silver City](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_45cf222e.png)

7. **Politik**
*2026*
Nations compete for military, political and corporate control of a fallen world.
![Politik](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_9d2b731f.jpg)

8. **dnup**
*2025*
Flip cards to get the right numbers and ditch your cards.
![dnup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_515f0bed.jpg)

9. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_18f8f45f.jpg)

10. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_325b837f.jpg)

11. **Wondrous Creatures**
*2024*
Build the best reserve in the world for 100+ fantastic creatures!
![Wondrous Creatures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_41733641.jpg)

12. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-majority game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_3883bc0b.jpg)

13. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_5010700f.jpg)

14. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_230150ec.png)

15. **Diables**
*2026*
A strategic eurogame of fire, timing, and crowd mastery.
![Diables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_353bcc1f.jpg)

16. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_d7844b26.png)

17. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_57707601.jpg)

18. **Duel of Meloch**
*2026*
Scythe vs Expeditions: Clash head-to-head on a tight map in a race to victory.
![Duel of Meloch](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_2e0acdfe.png)

19. **Yonder**
*2026*
Fantasy worker placement with asymmetric workers building towns.
![Yonder](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_292e98a0.png)

20. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_7db4da15.jpg)

21. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_358886e6.jpg)

22. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_876c9e3f.jpg)

23. **Wingspan**
*2019*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_c4343ced.jpg)

24. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_fa205a7d.jpg)

25. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_4b0387c1.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*18 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_f44c3898.jpg)

*21 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_c56fcce3.jpg)

*54 months on the list*

6. **Azul**
*104 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.

11. **Faraway**
*26 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_558670e0.png)

12. **Forest Shuffle**
*33 months on the list*

![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-07-07/toplist/bgg_a0baa5d7.jpg)
